summary: Iteration 27: Testing new editor features - YouTube link dialog with preview vs link choice, and Extended Link dialog with URL and Document tabs. All 8 tests passed successfully (1 skipped due to test data conditions).
seed_data_creation: None - all tests use existing documents and dynamic test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: (1) YouTube video insertion now shows a dialog with two options: 'Video-Vorschau einbetten' (embed video preview) or 'Nur als Link anzeigen' (show as link only). (2) The Link button in editor opens a dialog with tabs for 'URL' and 'Dokument'. URL tab allows entering URL and optional display text. Document tab shows a searchable list with thumbnails. When no text is selected and a document is chosen, user can pick: Vorschaubild (Thumbnail for images), Eigener Link-Text (Custom link text), or Gekürzter Dateiname (Shortened filename). Document links in articles should open a fullscreen preview dialog when clicked via handleContentClick handler in ArticleView.

youtube_dialog_preview_vs_link.details: Dialog shows 'Video-Vorschau einbetten' and 'Nur als Link anzeigen' options with radio buttons

youtube_embed_as_preview.details: Selecting preview option inserts YouTube iframe into editor

youtube_insert_as_link.details: Selecting link option inserts clickable link instead of iframe

link_dialog_tabs.details: Link dialog has URL and Dokument tabs, URL tab is selected by default

link_dialog_url_tab.details: URL tab allows entering URL and optional display text (Anzeigetext)

link_dialog_document_tab.details: Document tab shows searchable list with thumbnails for images

document_display_type_options.details: When document selected (no text selected), shows: Vorschaubild (Thumbnail), Eigener Link-Text, Gekürzter Dateiname

link_button_disabled_state.details: Link einfügen button is disabled when no URL or document selected

article_view_document_preview_handler.details: ArticleView has handleContentClick handler for document preview links
